name: Idle Farming Business
author: Poki
description: Idle Farming Business is an idle game where you take control of a cute plot of land to build up your own farm! There are tons of different vegetables for you to grow and expand your business! From simple potatoes and carrots to more interesting radishes and beets. You even get your own strawberry patch! Once you start getting a little full on the farm, you can harvest all your crops to get a bonus multiplier and get even more money from the next batch! How to play Idle Farming Business? Click and drag your mouse over the crops to collect them. Purchase upgrades from the shop and harvert your crops to get stronger! Who created Idle Farming Business? Idle Farming Business is created by MarketJS. Play their other casual games on Poki : Rally Champion , stupid-zombies-2, castle-blocks, Idle Startup Tycoon , Idle Mining Empire , Idle Money Tree , stupid-zombies, Classic Solitaire , castle-fight-with-buddies, Ping Pong , sudoku-village, Tactical Squad , Super Bubble Shooter , Mine Sweeper , Mine Sweeper , 8-ball-pool-with-buddies, mahjong-pyramids, Unblock It , Power Badminton , True Love Calculator , Hangman , Ludo Hero , math-trivia-live, Super Girl Story and Typing Fighter How can I play Idle Farming Business for free? You can play Idle Farming Business for free on Poki. Can I play Idle Farming Business on mobile devices and desktop? Idle Farming Business can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
